description: SYN flood already mitigated by shield (xdp + cloudflare). The scenario seeds a pre-built shield incident because reproducing a 10k pps flood on the CI runner would require a packet generator. Stub AI returns Ignore (shield already mitigated; the agent's job is to acknowledge, not re-block). Target envelope per spec 024: 1 incident, 1 telegram, blocks=0 (upstream mitigation is what handled the attack). The scenario guards against accidental double-blocking regressions in the shield path.
